raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "position": "for", "argument": "Cowork-Atlas should audit and fix all instances of red UI across VOLAURA, MindShift, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, and ZEUS using Figma MCP and Supabase MCP. Law 1: NEVER RED is violated in multiple products — MindShift has red error toasts, Life Simulator uses #EF4444 in form validation. Cowork can scan Figma files via MCP, detect red classes, and update them to purple (#D4B4FF) or amber (#E9C400). It can also query Supabase for client-side code using red hex values or Tailwind classes, then patch via file update. This task is independent, high-impact, and uses Cowork’s browser-based tools. Expected output: patched Figma designs, updated frontend files, and a report listing all fixes. Code-Atlas cannot do this — lacks Figma access. Cowork can.", "strongest_counter": "Fixing UI colors might seem low-priority vs. core functionality, but Law 1 is foundational — red triggers RSD in ADHD users, leading to abandonment. Aesthetic ≠ optional.", "evidence_cited": ["ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md §LAW 1: NEVER RED", "Figma files show red error states in MindShift", "Supabase client code contains text-red-500"], "whistleblower_flag": null}
argument: Cowork-Atlas should audit and fix all instances of red UI across VOLAURA, MindShift, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, and ZEUS using Figma MCP and Supabase MCP. Law 1: NEVER RED is violated in multiple products — MindShift has red error toasts, Life Simulator uses #EF4444 in form validation. Cowork can scan Figma files via MCP, detect red classes, and update them to purple (#D4B4FF) or amber (#E9C400). It can also query Supabase for client-side code using red hex values or Tailwind classes, then patch via file update. This task is independent, high-impact, and uses Cowork’s browser-based tools. Expected output: patched Figma designs, updated frontend files, and a report listing all fixes. Code-Atlas cannot do this — lacks Figma access. Cowork can.
strongest_counter: Fixing UI colors might seem low-priority vs. core functionality, but Law 1 is foundational — red triggers RSD in ADHD users, leading to abandonment. Aesthetic ≠ optional.
evidence_cited: Figma files show red error states in MindShift
